instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
SEO Insertions on Buy Plan that Insures for Your Cancer- Article Page
Keyword density and no. of target keywords has been mentioned as comments in the beginning
Suggested additional anchor texts are marked as comments in Yellow. (If required)
Keywords: cancer treatment, critical illness cover, critical illness insurance policy, critical illness insurance
Body Content:
Introduction
In India, quality public healthcare has always been difficult to access. As a result, most people are forced to approach private healthcare centres to access quality treatment for themselves and their loved ones.
In line with inflation, the cost of healthcare and related expenses have also risen significantly. In fact, the cost of healthcare inflation is estimated to be rising at a double-digit rate.
The situation is further worsened by the increasing incidences of non-communicable diseases (NCD), such as cancer. At any given point in time today, everybody knows at least 2 or 3 people directly or indirectly who are battling cancer. It is thus, important to prepare for the worst by taking measures that may help you battle cancer, if the need arises.
Staying healthy and maintaining a healthy routine and lifestyle is just one part of taking precautions against contracting diseases like cancer. However, that is not completely foolproof since many people who take good care of themselves might also end up contracting cancer.
Thus, it is best to take the aid of tools that may help you plan better on how you can avail treatment if the need ever arises. There are several insurance policies that can prove to be a boon during cancer treatment. It is common knowledge that the treatment for cancer is extremely costly, especially as it involves multiple rounds of diagnosis and even surgery. Post surgery also, there is a need to continue different types of therapy and take various medication to prevent the disease from surfacing again.
While health insurance policies are ideal for covering the costs related to hospitalisation, they are not very effective when you are facing a disease that is long drawn out, like cancer. In such cases, a critical illness cover is often the best plan for ensuring that you can avail the best treatment.
Advantages Offered Under Critical Illness Insurance
A critical illness insurance policy can be beneficial while getting treatment for cancer. Read on below to learn about the advantages of availing a critical illness insurance plan.
Lump Sum Payout:A critical illness cover lets you avail the sum assured as a lump sum payout the minute you receive a diagnosis for cancer. As a result, the multiple rounds of diagnosis, surgery, and even post-surgical care can be taken care of without you having to dip into your family’s savings or investments. While a health insurance policy requires you to provide bills and reasons for availing the sum assured from the insurer, with a critical illness insurance policy, you need not do any of that as the sum assured is provided to you at the very beginning of your treatment.
No Out-of-Pocket Expenditure:Aside from the treatment of cancer, there are several other expenses that may crop up. For instance, if you live in a city where there are no hospitals or doctors that are able to treat your cancer, you may have to travel to a different city for treatment. Going to a different city means paying for transport as well as the cost of food and accommodation while you are staying there. All of these expenses tend to add up and result in huge expenditure by the end of your treatment and stay. Additionally, the policyholder will be accompanied by a friend or family member, whose travel and lodging also has to be taken care of. Since a critical illness insurance plan offers a lump sum payment right at the beginning, all such costs can be taken care of without spending any money out of your pockets.
Compensates for Loss of Income:Cancer treatment can often be a long and arduous process. As a result, many people undergoing cancer treatment could be unable to work for several months or even years. At such times, a critical illness cover can be very useful since it also compensates the policyholder for this loss in income. This is an extremely beneficial feature of the critical illness insurance policy especially if the policyholder is also the breadwinner of the family and responsible for making everyday payments and even payments such as home loan EMIs or their children’s school fees.
Tax Benefits:The lump sum amount offered as the sum insured with the critical illness insurance plan is completely exempted from taxation. This ensures that you do not lose any portion of it to taxes and are free to use it to meet the treatment expenses as well as household expenses.
Low Premiums:The premiums you are required to pay for a critical illness cover is low compared to the premiums you might need to pay for other kinds of insurance policies. The sum assured you receive through these low premiums, however, is adequate to meet your needs. However, the premium costs can differ from insurer to insurer, so it is best to conduct thorough research before selecting an insurer. It is also important to know that the cost of premium depends primarily on the age of the policyholder. Thus, it is best to avail these policies when you are young and relatively healthy.
Conclusion
Cancer is a disease that takes a toll physically, mentally, and financially not only for the patient but also their immediate family and friends. It is necessary to take precautionary measures well in advance to ensure that you can avail the best treatment if and when the need arises. A critical illness cover is often the best way to prepare for such eventualities.
input.compliance_comments: [Harshita Rajawat]: cancer treatment (3) – 0.3%critical illness cover(5) – 0.5%critical illness insurance policy (3) – 0.3%critical illness insurance (4) – 0.4%The Total Keyword Density is 1.5% which is ideal for 914 words count article.The placements of the target keywords are apt. (Context: SEO Insertions on Buy Plan that Insures for Your Cancer- Article Page)
